title: Remote compatibility pre-check (manifest gate)
description: Re-scoped 2026-06-17 to Design A: pre-generation compat pre-check that reads GET /wrapper/manifest and blocks the first remote generate on unknown schema-version or workflow-bundle mismatch (clear modal, not a mid-gen crash), warns on incomplete models + version drift. Reinitialize/Repair matrix withdrawn (engine in image, volume = models only). Blocked on wrapper writer half (manifest must stamp version/bundle fields). See brief.md / plan.md.
